creator: saper@saper.info
text:
Example of a failure followed by normal resolution:

[1705570789] local-unbound[53087:0] info: ::1 www.duckduckgo.com. AAAA IN
[1705570789] local-unbound[53087:0] error: SERVFAIL <www.duckduckgo.com. AAAA IN>: exceeded the maximum number of sends

[1705570789] local-unbound[53087:0] info: ::1 www.duckduckgo.com. AAAA IN
[1705570789] local-unbound[53087:0] error: SERVFAIL <www.duckduckgo.com. AAAA IN>: exceeded the maximum number of sends
[1705570789] local-unbound[53087:0] info: ::1 www.duckduckgo.com. AAAA IN SERVFAIL 0.000000 0 47

[1705570795] local-unbound[53087:0] info: ::1 normandy.cdn.mozilla.net. A IN NOERROR 0.103757 0 116
